# ggseg3d

Interactive 3D brain atlas visualization in R. Plot brain parcellations
as WebGL meshes powered by Three.js, or render publication-quality
static images through rgl and rayshader. A pipe-friendly API lets you
map data onto brain regions, control camera angles, toggle region edges,
overlay glass brains, and snapshot the result.

## Installation

Install from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("ggseg3d")
```

Or get the development version from the [ggsegverse
r-universe](https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev):

``` r
options(
  repos = c(
    ggsegverse = "https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev",
    CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"
  )
)
install.packages("ggseg3d")
```

## Atlases

Three atlases ship with the package (via
[ggseg.formats](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg.formats/)):

1.  `dk` – Desikan-Killiany cortical atlas
2.  `aseg` – Automatic subcortical segmentation
3.  `tracula` – White-matter tract atlas

Additional atlases are available through the [ggsegverse
r-universe](https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev).

## Usage

``` r
ggseg3d(atlas = dk(), hemisphere = "left") |>
  pan_camera("left lateral")
```

![](reference/figures/README-dk_3d-plot.png)

Subcortical structures with a translucent glass brain overlay:

``` r
ggseg3d(atlas = aseg()) |>
  add_glassbrain() |>
  pan_camera("right lateral")
```

![](reference/figures/README-aseg_3d-plot.png)

See the [package website](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/) for the
full walkthrough, rayshader rendering, and Shiny integration.

## Citation

Mowinckel & Vidal-Piñeiro (2020). *Visualization of Brain Statistics
With R Packages ggseg and ggseg3d.* Advances in Methods and Practices in
Psychological Science.
[doi:10.1177/2515245920928009](https://doi.org/10.1177/2515245920928009)

## Funding

This tool is partly funded by:

**EU Horizon 2020 Grant:** Healthy minds 0-100 years: Optimising the use
of European brain imaging cohorts (Lifebrain).

**Grant agreement number:** 732592.

**Call:** Societal challenges: Health, demographic change and well-being

# Package index

## Plotting

Core 3D visualization function

- [`ggseg3d()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/ggseg3d.md)
  : Plot 3D brain parcellations
- [`ggsegray()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/ggsegray.md)
  : Render brain atlas with rgl

## Widget Customization

Pipe-friendly functions to modify the 3D widget

- [`pan_camera()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/pan_camera.md)
  : Pan camera position of ggseg3d plot
- [`add_glassbrain()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/add_glassbrain.md)
  : Add glass brain to ggseg3d plot
- [`set_background()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_background.md)
  : Set background color of ggseg3d plot
- [`set_dimensions()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_dimensions.md)
  : Set widget dimensions
- [`set_edges()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_edges.md)
  : Set region boundary edges
- [`set_flat_shading()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_flat_shading.md)
  : Enable flat shading for ggseg3d plot
- [`set_legend()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_legend.md)
  : Set legend visibility
- [`set_orthographic()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_orthographic.md)
  : Enable orthographic camera for ggseg3d plot
- [`set_positioning()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/set_positioning.md)
  : Set hemisphere positioning mode
- [`snapshot_brain()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/snapshot_brain.md)
  : Save ggseg3d widget as image

## Mesh Utilities

Work with brain surface meshes

- [`resolve_brain_mesh()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/resolve_brain_mesh.md)
  : Resolve brain surface mesh

## Shiny

Shiny integration

- [`ggseg3dOutput()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/ggseg3d-shiny.md)
  [`renderGgseg3d()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/ggseg3d-shiny.md)
  : Shiny bindings for ggseg3d
- [`updateGgseg3dCamera()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/updateGgseg3dCamera.md)
  : Update camera in Shiny
- [`updateGgseg3dBackground()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggseg3d/reference/updateGgseg3dBackground.md)
  : Update background in Shiny
